Class Player

java.lang.Object
Player.Player
Direct Known Subclasses:
Computer
public class Player extends Object
The player class store the information of a single player object. A player has points, bonus owned, tokens owned, developmentCard owned, developmentCard reversed, noble owned

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Player(String name)
    Initialize the tokens, bonuses and name of player

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addDevelopmentCard(DevelopmentCard card)
    Add development card to player development cards and bonus
    void
    addNobles(Noble noble)
    Add noble object to player inventory when they qualify for a noble visit
    void
    addReserve(DevelopmentCard card)
    Adds a DevelopmentCard object to the player reserve when they reserve a card
    void
    addTokens(String color, int amount)
    Adds tokens to player tokens based on color
    void
    buyReserve(DevelopmentCard card)
    Removes DevelopmentCard object from player reserve when they decide to buy it
    int
    getBonus(String color)
    Returns number of bonuses of a specific color the player has
    String
    getName()
    Returns name of player
    ArrayList<Noble>
    getPlayerNobles()
    Returns an arrayList of noble objects owned by the player
    int
    getPoints()
    Returns number of prestige points the player has
    DevelopmentCard
    getReserveCard(int index)
    Returns a card in the reserve at a specific index
    int
    getTokens(String color)
    Returns number of tokens of a specific color the player owns
    void
    printStatus()
    Returns a string containing the player's prestige points, token, bonuses, reserved cards, nobles, total tokens and total cards in reserve
    void
    removeTokens(String color, int amount)
    Remove tokens from player tokens based on color
    int
    totalDevelopmentCards()
    Returns total number of development cards owned by player (or total bonuses)
    int
    totalNobles()
    Returns the total number of nobles owned by player
    int
    totalReserves()
    Returns the total number of cards within the player's reserve
    int
    totalTokens()
    Returns the total number of tokens owned by player

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String name)
      Initialize the tokens, bonuses and name of player
      Parameters:
      name - Name of player

  • Method Details

    • getTokens

      public int getTokens(String color)
      Returns number of tokens of a specific color the player owns
      Parameters:
      color - color of token
      Returns:
      number of tokens of a specific color the player owns

    • getBonus

      public int getBonus(String color)
      Returns number of bonuses of a specific color the player has
      Parameters:
      color - color of bonus
      Returns:
      number of bonuses of the specific color

    • getPoints

      public int getPoints()
      Returns number of prestige points the player has
      Returns:
      number of prestige points the player has

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns name of player
      Returns:
      name of player

    • totalTokens

      public int totalTokens()
      Returns the total number of tokens owned by player
      Returns:
      total number of tokens owned by player

    • addTokens

      public void addTokens(String color, int amount)
      Adds tokens to player tokens based on color
      Parameters:
      color - color of token
      amount - amount of tokens of that color taken by player

    • removeTokens

      public void removeTokens(String color, int amount)
      Remove tokens from player tokens based on color
      Parameters:
      color - color of tokens
      amount - amount of tokens of that color used by player

    • addDevelopmentCard

      public void addDevelopmentCard(DevelopmentCard card)
      Add development card to player development cards and bonus
      Parameters:
      card - DevelopementCard object to add

    • totalDevelopmentCards

      public int totalDevelopmentCards()
      Returns total number of development cards owned by player (or total bonuses)
      Returns:
      total number of development cards owned by player

    • addNobles

      public void addNobles(Noble noble)
      Add noble object to player inventory when they qualify for a noble visit
      Parameters:
      noble - Noble object the player qualified for

    • getPlayerNobles

      public ArrayList<Noble> getPlayerNobles()
      Returns an arrayList of noble objects owned by the player
      Returns:
      arrayList of noble objects owned by player

    • totalNobles

      public int totalNobles()
      Returns the total number of nobles owned by player
      Returns:
      total number of nobles owned by player

    • getReserveCard

      public DevelopmentCard getReserveCard(int index)
      Returns a card in the reserve at a specific index
      Parameters:
      index - index of card within reserve
      Returns:
      DevelopmentCard object at the specific index within the reserve

    • addReserve

      public void addReserve(DevelopmentCard card)
      Adds a DevelopmentCard object to the player reserve when they reserve a card
      Parameters:
      card - DevelopmentCard object reserved by player

    • buyReserve

      public void buyReserve(DevelopmentCard card)
      Removes DevelopmentCard object from player reserve when they decide to buy it
      Parameters:
      card - DevelopmentCard object within reserve the player wants to buy

    • totalReserves

      public int totalReserves()
      Returns the total number of cards within the player's reserve
      Returns:
      total number of cards within the player's reserve

    • printStatus

      public void printStatus()
      Returns a string containing the player's prestige points, token, bonuses, reserved cards, nobles, total tokens and total cards in reserve
